body:
If you're replacing garage door hardware (such as springs, rollers, hinges, tracks, cables, or bearing plates), these are among the strongest local options in and around Pleasanton:

  1. Graham Garage Doors

 * 4.9★ with 250+ reviews.

 * Well-regarded for repairs, hardware replacement, spring work, and preventive maintenance.

 * Good choice if you're looking to repair an existing door rather than replace it.

  2. Precision Garage Door Service

 * 5.0★ local rating.

 * Handles replacement of springs, rollers, cables, hinges, tracks, and openers.

 * Offers extended daily service hours.

  3. The Door Doctor

 * Pleasanton-based company with 4.7★.

 * Provides 24-hour service and specializes in garage door repairs and hardware replacement.

  4. Valiant Garage Door

 * 5.0★ rated.

 * Local company offering emergency repairs, spring replacement, opener repairs, and complete hardware service. [Valiant Garage Door | Emergency Repair & Openers](https://www.valiantdoor.com/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

  5. Boulevard Garage Doors, LLC (Dublin)

 * 5.0★ with hundreds of reviews.

 * Popular throughout the Tri-Valley for residential repairs and replacement parts.

  6. Ace's Garage Door Repair & Installation (Dublin)

 * 4.9★ with over 1,000 reviews.

 * Frequently recommended for spring replacement, roller replacement, and same-day repairs. [Top-Rated Garage and Garage Door Services Experts in Pleasanton, CA | HomeAdvisor](https://www.homeadvisor.com/c.Garage-Garage-Doors.Pleasanton.CA.-12036.html?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

For hardware replacement specifically, ask each company:

  * Whether they'll replace only the failed hardware instead of recommending a full door replacement.

  * Whether they'll provide an itemized quote.

  * If replacing torsion springs, whether they recommend replacing both springs at the same time (common when one has failed because the other often has similar wear). Community advice from Bay Area garage door professionals also recommends this approach. [Garage door repair](https://www.reddit.com/r/eastbay/comments/1orgp3x/garage_door_repair/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

If you tell me **what hardware needs replacing** (springs, rollers, hinges, cables, track, or lock) and whether it's a **single-car or double-car garage** , I can also give you a rough idea of the expected price range in the Pleasanton area.  

Give feedback
